articles.headline: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again
articles.description: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola admits it feels "a little bit weird" to be facing Real Madrid in the Champions League yet again.

images.alt: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again

articles.headline: Wolves move past PL record-low points total with win over Aston Villa
articles.description: Wolves moved past Derby's record-low Premier League points tally as they dealt a blow to Aston Villa's top-four hopes with a 2-0 win at Molineux.

images.alt: Wolves move past PL record-low points total with win over Aston Villa

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal lead Liverpool, United for Gordon
articles.description: Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester United are set to battle for Anthony Gordon. Transfer Talk has the latest.

images.alt: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal lead Liverpool, United for Gordon

vids.description: Interim Chelsea manager Calum McFarlane shared his reflections on the club's 1-1 draw with Manchester City and outlined what he believes lies ahead following Enzo Maresca's departure.

gmStry.hdln: Managerless Chelsea hold Man City to late draw with Enzo Fernández equalizer
gmStry.desc: Enzo Fernández scored a stoppage-time equalizer as managerless Chelsea snatched a 1-1 draw at title-chasing Manchester City.

allCommentary.dtls: Second Half ends, Manchester City 1, Chelsea 1.
Attempt missed. Enzo Fernández (Chelsea) left footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Jorrel Hato with a headed pass.

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! Manchester City 1, Chelsea 0. Tijjani Reijnders (Manchester City) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top left corner.
Substitution, Chelsea. Andrey Santos replaces Estêvão.
Substitution, Manchester City. Abdukodir Khusanov replaces Josko Gvardiol because of an injury.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Abdukodir Khusanov | Off: Josko Gvardiol

keyEvents.dtls: Reece James (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Rúben Dias (Manchester City) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Chelsea. Jorrel Hato replaces Josh Acheampong.
keyEvents.shrtDtls:
On: Jorrel Hato | Off: Josh Acheampong
On: Liam Delap | Off: João Pedro

keyEvents.dtls: Substitution, Manchester City. Jérémy Doku replaces Tijjani Reijnders.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Jérémy Doku | Off: Tijjani Reijnders

keyEvents.dtls: Liam Delap (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card.
Matheus Nunes (Manchester City) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Manchester City. Nathan Aké replaces Rúben Dias.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Nathan Aké | Off: Rúben Dias

keyEvents.dtls: Bernardo Silva (Manchester City) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Manchester City 1, Chelsea 1. Enzo Fernández (Chelsea) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner.Goal confirmed following VAR Review.
Enzo Fernández (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
